In this function I put the following config by accident (trailing /) 
```
cloud base url = https://dev.private.netdata.cloud/
```

and it fails to parse correctly 

```
2020-03-20 10:27:27: netdata INFO  : ACLK_Main : (0200@aclk/aclk_:aclk_decode_bas): Setting ACLK target host=(null) port=(null) from https://dev.private.netdata.cloud/
```
Thanks, bug is in decode_base_url from master (this PR just moves it to another file). Therefore we have this bug in master. I will fix it
That won't work on https://host:1234/ - there needs to be an `else` to make the new case distinct.
